Wave7.name: 运行时防护强化 (P0)
Wave7.description: 自修复系统 + compaction 三策略 + 文本工具恢复 + E-Stop + prompt cache

Wave8.name: 集成与记忆增强 (P1)
Wave8.description: MCP OAuth 2.1 + LLM Reranking + Session Thread/Turn + Provider mapping + Retry enhancement + Tool trait + KG tools + dynamic budget
Wave8.notes: W8-T9 (rmcp upgrade) deferred — rmcp 0.16 client-only, no RoleServer. Moved to Wave 9 prerequisite.

Wave9-Pre.name: Wave 9 前置任务
Wave9-Pre.description: rmcp 0.16→1.x 升级，解锁 MCP Server 能力

Wave9.name: 精细优化 (P2) — 修订版
Wave9.description: RRF + Merkle(v10) + priority queue + metering storage(v11) + metering refactor + canary + image token(simplified) + ToolProgress + schema token(simplified)
Wave9.notes: T4 拆分为 T4a(存储+定价)+T4b(签名重构)。T7/T9 简化设计避免 breaking change。

Wave9-Ext.name: Wave 9 延伸任务
Wave9-Ext.description: MCP Server 角色 — 依赖 W8-T9 rmcp 升级完成
Wave9-Ext.notes: rmcp 0.16 无 RoleServer trait，需升级到 1.x。备选方案：自建 JSON-RPC server。

findings.deferred_correction: W8-T9 deferral reason was partially incorrect: rmcp 0.16 has client-side StreamableHTTP but NO server-side RoleServer

notes: Wave 9 feasibility review complete. Revised plan at wave9-revised-plan.md. T4 split, T7/T9 simplified, T6 blocked on W8-T9. Execution order: W8-T9(pre) → T1-T9(parallel agents) → T6(ext).
